content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Boboniu Likes to Color Balls". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/problemset/problem/1395/A
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer T, the number of test cases. Then T test cases follow. The first line of each test case contains a single integer n. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: For each test case, print the minimum number of colors needed to color the balls.

solution.approach: Use a graph coloring approach to solve the problem. Create a graph where each ball is a node, and two nodes are connected if the corresponding balls have the same color. Then, use a graph coloring algorithm to find the minimum number of colors needed.
